历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 47th, 42nd, 46th (2024), and 92nd (2025). Rankings remained stable between 42nd and 47th from 2021 to 2024, but significantly dropped to 92nd in 2025, a shift of about 46 places in one year, indicating increased volatility. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province: 31 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2024, 33 in 2025, and 54 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan expands by 21 students (+63.6%), a substantial increase that significantly reduces competition, leading to a trend of larger ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University: a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top national institution. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving daily issues such as cafeteria management and campus openness, with no major negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), with massive short video exposure and sustained high application attention. Historical enrollment anomaly records show only normal admission heat for Tsinghua, with no gaps. Tsinghua has over 30 A+ disciplines, including representative ones like Computer Science and Technology (A+), Clinical Medicine (A+), Mechanical Engineering (A+), Electrical Engineering (A+), Architecture (A+), and Law (A+), with top-tier academic strength that strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Guizhou Province, so there is no local enrollment preference. In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment plan of 54 students accounts for a small proportion, with limited regional preference influence. Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Tsinghua's advantageous disciplines. Clinical Medicine and Law also maintain recommendation heat. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (Physics Category 207,171 + History Category 90,087 = 297,258), with stable overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop in 2025 (92nd), the substantial expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026 (33 to 54, +63.6%), the basically unchanged total number of candidates, and the continued strong brand effect of Tsinghua: the expansion is the most critical factor driving the ranking drop, but Tsinghua's top-tier academic strength and extremely high social heat constrain the extent of the drop. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 112th, with a range of 92 to 132.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 92), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
